agent_prompts.workflow: Use current market analysis plus stored factor scorecards to decide whether the present trade plan is supported, overfit, or missing evidence for NQ_LOCAL_AQ_MTF_123820.

prompts.objective: Audit whether the dataset and command context are sufficient for trustworthy iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the dataset-audit agent. Check whether the current dataset scope, paired market coverage, and command context are sufficient before making factor or model changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=NQ_LOCAL_AQ_MTF_123820 data_path=analyze paired_data_path=None candles=0 paired_candles=None source_command=analyze
success_criteria: Flag low sample size or missing paired-market evidence before approving major factor changes
If this run is not comparable to prior runs, tell the next agent not to over-interpret score deltas

prompts.objective: Review whether raw regime/liquidity/factor evidence should be passed to BBN directly or neutralized first.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the pre-bayes evidence gate. Compare raw labels with filtered labels, conflicts, and evidence quality before trusting the downstream Bayesian inference.

If regime and factor alignment conflict, prefer neutralization over direct Bayesian commitment

prompts.objective: Review whether soft evidence diverges materially from filtered labels before trusting BBN output.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the pre-bayes soft-evidence reviewer. Compare filtered states with soft evidence distributions and explain whether the Bayesian layer is receiving stable or ambiguous evidence.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=NQ_LOCAL_AQ_MTF_123820 filtered_assignments={"factor_alignment": "mixed", "factor_uncertainty": "high", "liquidity_context": "neutral", "market_regime": "range", "market_state_primary_regime": "TrendExpansion", "market_state_secondary_regime": "BullTrendAcceleration", "multi_timeframe_resonance": "mixed"} soft_market_regime={"bear": 0.2, "bull": 0.2, "range": 0.6} soft_liquidity_context={"favorable": 0.2, "hostile": 0.2, "neutral": 0.6} soft_factor_alignment={"bearish": 0.2, "bullish": 0.2, "mixed": 0.6} soft_factor_uncertainty={"high": 0.6, "low": 0.4} soft_mtf_resonance={"aligned": 0.2, "dislocated": 0.2, "mixed": 0.6}
success_criteria: Call out when the dominant soft-evidence state diverges from the filtered hard label
If entropy is high, prefer observe-only or neutralized review over confident Bayesian commitment

prompts.objective: Review the current market conclusion and identify whether factor evidence supports the selected direction.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the market-review agent. Challenge the current trade direction using price-action evidence, factor diagnostics, and uncertainty. Do not change factor definitions here; decide whether the current conclusion is supported or should be downgraded.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=NQ_LOCAL_AQ_MTF_123820 decision_hint=Observe only: current run not comparable to last analyze (no_previous_run).|pda_sequence=unavailable|hybrid_regime_label=range_choppy|hybrid_regime_age=1|pre_bayes_gating_status=observe_only|pre_bayes_quality_score=0.144|mtf_source=analyze_explicit_frames covered_intervals=15m,1h,1d mtf_direction=bullish mtf_alignment=0.3332 mtf_entry_alignment=0.9689 dataset_comparability={comparable:false, reason:no_previous_run} canonical_structural_regime=active=range confidence=0.144 probs=range=0.328,stress=0.234,transition=0.219,trend=0.219 evidence_count=17 multi_timeframe_summary=["multi_timeframe_source=analyze_explicit_frames covered_intervals=15m,1h,1d", "multi_timeframe_missing=1m,5m,30m,4h", "15m:1500 bars path=docs/experiments/actionable-regime-confidence/runs/20260512T123820+0800-codex-non-btc-local-aq-mtf-chain-probe-v1/provider-data-json/NQ_USD-1h.json", "1h:1500 bars path=docs/experiments/actionable-regime-confidence/runs/20260512T123820+0800-codex-non-btc-local-aq-mtf-chain-probe-v1/provider-data-json/NQ_USD-4h.json", "1d:1500 bars path=docs/experiments/actionable-regime-confidence/runs/20260512T123820+0800-codex-non-btc-local-aq-mtf-chain-probe-v1/provider-data-json/NQ_USD-1d.json", "higher_timeframe_direction_bias=bullish", "higher_timeframe_alignment_score=0.3332", "lower_timeframe_entry_alignment_score=0.9689"] selected_direction=Bear selected_score=0.173 selected_win_probability=0.403 trade_direction=Neutral posterior=0.000 factor_alignment=mixed factor_uncertainty=high long_support=0.020 short_support=0.028 uncertainty=0.514 bullish_factors=["volatility_mean_reversion:0.020"] bearish_factors=["structure_ict:-0.026", "trend_momentum:-0.002"]
success_criteria: Explicitly name which factors support long, which support short, and which only add uncertainty
If uncertainty is high, recommend what evidence the next agent should wait for

prompts.objective: Select which factors to keep, tune, observe, or replace.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the factor-iteration agent. Use only the supplied scorecards and feedback summary to decide which factor edits are justified. Do not invent success criteria; follow the thresholds embedded in each factor prompt.

prompts.objective: Review which factors are failing by regime and whether weight updates should be trusted.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the feedback-diagnostics agent. Compare factor success rates, grading, and weaknesses. Focus on regime-conditional failure and persistent underperformance.
